sections.paragraph:
([“perhaps ‘dog,’ i.e. כֶּלֶב”], i.q. كَلِبُ “rabid”?), Caleb, pr.n. borne by-

(1) the companion of Joshua, the son of Jephunneh, Num 13:6 14:6 , seq.; Jos 15:14. Patron. כָּלִבִּי 1Sa 25:3.-(2) 1Ch 2:18, 19 1Ch 2:19, for which there is כְּלוּבַי ver. 1Ch 2:9.-(3) 1Ch 2:50.

[“כָּלֵב אֶפְרָתָה [Caleb-ephratah], pr.n. of a place elsewhere unknown, 1Ch 2:24.”]
